complaintDesc: 18112 tatanagar running more than 45 minutes delay whether scr knows this matter or not and this train stopped at garla for 10 minutes
remarks: We regret the inconvenience caused. This train regulated at Garla for clearance of other train. However, instructions are given to the concerned officials to run this train on priority basis. Thank you for your patience and assure you of our best services.

complaintDesc: 18112 tatanagar express delayed by 30 minutes no available to go khammam from warangal for employees
feedbackRemark: It is running more than 40 minutes delay at warangal station even scr doesn't know train position
remarks: Train No 18112 Express presently running 11 minutes before time as per Working Timetable and will be handed over before time to destination.  We thank you for your valuable feedback and assure you of our best services.

complaintDesc: overcharging on tea kacheguda station platform no 1
feedbackRemark: Need to have penalty for this vendor
remarks: Dear Sir / Madam, we are in receipt of your representation through RailMadad. As per the conversation with complainant informed that he purchased tea at Stall by Licencee Name: H S Sudhindra on PF-1 at kacheguda station charged Rs10/- amount paid through UPI. Informed to concerned officials @CCI/KCG to enquire into the matter for necessary action and also instructed to conduct surprise checks to avoid inconvenience to our valued passengers.Thank you for contacting RailMadad
